# Nicky Myny — Contemporary Painter

> Nicky Myny is a contemporary painter working between Belgium (Aarschot)
> and South Africa (Cape Winelands). She creates original paintings,
> private and family commissions, and site-responsive collaborations that
> translate life transitions into form.

Nicky Myny is also the founder of ARTKOM Arts & Health (https://artkom.be),
her separate participatory arts practice for organisations, care contexts
and communities. This site covers the painting practice only.

## Offer
- Original paintings and collections: https://nickymyny.com/works
- Private commissions (from €800): https://nickymyny.com/private-commissions
- The FRAME Experience, a family commission (from €2,800): https://nickymyny.com/frame
- Collaborations with artists, brands and institutions: https://nickymyny.com/collaborations
- Open Studio days and Studio Immersions: https://nickymyny.com/studio

## Key facts
- Contemporary painter, abstraction and figuration
- Studios in Aarschot (Belgium) and the Cape Winelands (South Africa)
- Selected contexts: Roche BeLux, EOSC, SDG Tent at WEF Davos, Swartland
- Full artwork archive: https://www.artworkarchive.com/profile/nicky-myny
- Contact: artist@nickymyny.com

## Related
- ARTKOM Arts & Health (participatory practice): https://artkom.be
